Session-length window computes dynamic resolution for full history 42-minute session targets 300-900 data points

Time window selection is independent of view mode time window is a separate state dimension from aggregate/detail mode
1-minute window buffer at capacity wraps correctly 601st sample evicts the oldest, preserving 600-sample window
Partially filled window still produces valid stats stats computed correctly when buffer has fewer samples than capacity
Time window persists when switching from aggregate to session detail selected time window survives aggregate-to-detail-to-aggregate navigation
Charts update when time window selection changes changing time window selection updates the displayed window label

crossSessionAggregator properties @property: empty input yields zero aggregate

crossSessionAggregator properties @property: total active agents equals sum of per-session agent counts
crossSessionAggregator properties @property: session count equals input array length

createInitialMetrics produces zeroed metrics with the given session id
token-bearing events update tokens and cost prompt_submit with tokens increases totalTokens, inputTokens, outputTokens, and sessionCost
token-bearing events update tokens and cost token accumulation is monotonically non-decreasing over sequence of token events
tool_call_start increments tool count without affecting cost tool count increments while cost and tokens remain unchanged
session_start increments active agent count each session_start adds one to activeAgentCount
session_start increments active agent count sets sessionStartedAt on first session_start event
agent_complete decrements active agent count agent_complete reduces activeAgentCount by one
agent_complete decrements active agent count activeAgentCount floors at 0 when already zero
every event increments hookEventCount and updates lastEventAt hookEventCount increments by one for any event type
every event increments hookEventCount and updates lastEventAt lastEventAt is set to event receivedAt
session cost is never negative regardless of event sequence any sequence of events produces non-negative session cost
api_request event with cost_usd updates session cost by exact cost_usd value cost_usd=0.042 produces sessionCost of exactly 0.042
api_request without cost_usd falls back to pricing model session cost matches calculateCost result when cost_usd absent
api_request with cost_usd=0.0 treats zero as valid cost session cost remains zero when cost_usd is 0.0
OTel identity event types increment hookEventCount only user_prompt increments hookEventCount and does not affect tokens or cost
OTel identity event types increment hookEventCount only tool_result increments hookEventCount and does not affect tokens or cost
OTel identity event types increment hookEventCount only api_error increments hookEventCount and does not affect tokens or cost
OTel identity event types increment hookEventCount only tool_decision increments hookEventCount and does not affect tokens or cost
api_request with malformed payload falls back gracefully non-object payload (string) produces no cost or token change
api_request with malformed payload falls back gracefully array payload produces no cost or token change
api_request with malformed payload falls back gracefully null payload produces no cost or token change
api_request with malformed payload falls back gracefully usage field as array falls back to pricing model
api_request with malformed payload falls back gracefully usage field as null falls back to pricing model
api_request with non-number cost_usd falls back to pricing model cost_usd as string falls back to pricing model calculation
api_request with empty payload returns unchanged metrics empty object payload produces no token or cost change
sessionStartedAt is preserved after first session_start second session_start does not overwrite sessionStartedAt
aggregator produces new object without mutating previous previous metrics object is unchanged after aggregation
